PARAM.name: IAU_POSITION
PARAM.value: {"iau position":"12h34m15.0000s -42d27m30.000s Equatorial B1950","search position":"189.242787 -42.733435 Equatorial J2000.0","radius":"15.00"}

PARAM.name: Publisher
PARAM.DESCRIPTION:
Copyright 2019-2026 Caltech, Support from NASA is acknowledged. This information is taken from a collection created and curated by the NASA/IPAC Extragalactic Database (NED), operated by the California Institute of Technology (Caltech). If your research benefits from the use of NED, the following acknowledgement in your paper would be appreciated:
"This research has made use of the NASA/IPAC Extragalactic Database (NED), which is funded by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration and operated by the California Institute of Technology."
See: https://ned.ipac.caltech.edu/Documents/Overview/Acknowledgments

FIELD.name: No.
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A row number applicable to this list only

FIELD.name: Object Name
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Object name in NED standard format

FIELD.name: RA-s
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Right Ascension in sexagesimal (FK5 Equatorial J2000.0)

FIELD.name: RA
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Right Ascension in degrees (FK5 Equatorial J2000.0)

FIELD.name: z flag
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Redshift flags indicating measurement technique (1 char, e.g., S=spec, P=phot), method (2 chars, e.g., SL=single line), and quality (1 char, e.g. blank= reliable, ?=uncertain).

FIELD.name: Phys Type
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Physical type of the celestial object

FIELD.name: EM Region
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Region of the electromagnetic spectrum where the object was detected

FIELD.name: Separation
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Angular separation between object and search center
